name: calle
description: Self-contained OpenClaw tool plugin for OpenAgent with brokered web login.

baseUrl.title: OpenAgent base URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL for the deployed OpenAgent service. Defaults to https://seleven-mcp-sg.airudder.com.

brokerBaseUrl.title: Broker base URL
brokerBaseUrl.description: Optional override for the broker login API host. Defaults to baseUrl.

serverUrl.title: Remote MCP URL
serverUrl.description: Optional override for the remote MCP endpoint. Defaults to <baseUrl>/mcp/<channel>.

authBaseUrl.title: OAuth auth base URL
authBaseUrl.description: Optional override for the OAuth auth host. Defaults to baseUrl.

cacheRoot.title: Token cache root
cacheRoot.description: Optional cache root for locally stored brokered OAuth tokens. Defaults to the Gateway user's home directory under .calle-mcp/openclaw-brokered-auth.

scope.title: OAuth scope
scope.description: OAuth scopes requested during browser login.

clientName.title: OAuth client name
clientName.description: Display name shown to the broker login flow.

timeoutSeconds.title: HTTP timeout seconds
timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout used when the plugin calls broker APIs or the remote MCP endpoint.

minTtlSeconds.title: Minimum token TTL seconds
minTtlSeconds.description: Minimum remaining token lifetime required before the cached token is reused.
